chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5645 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2471/2025. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2025 Petitioner, Bakhtiar Ali, is present in person. 1. Urgency granted. 2&3. This petition seeks to assail rights in respect of immovable property, however, the same is not amenable in writ jurisdiction. The rights are in respect of a person other than the petitioner, hence, the petitioner has not able to establish his locus standi to maintain this petition. Even otherwise, the dispute requires inquiry, investigation and evidence etc and writ jurisdiction is not appropriate forum in such regard. In view hereof, petition is found to be misconceived, hence dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
